1тЖТ# Metro Fleet Mileage Management System
     2тЖТ# Part 9: Demo Application Specification
     3тЖТ
     4тЖТ**Document Version:** 1.0  
     5тЖТ**Status:** APPROVED FOR DEMO DEVELOPMENT  
     6тЖТ**Purpose:** Win-the-bid client demonstration  
     7тЖТ**Target:** Single-user utility with live data import
     8тЖТ
     9тЖТ---
    10тЖТ
    11тЖТ## 9.1 Demo Objectives
    12тЖТ
    13тЖТ### 9.1.1 Strategic Goals
    14тЖТ
    15тЖТ| Goal | How Demo Achieves It |
    16тЖТ|------|---------------------|
    17тЖТ| **Immediate "wow"** | Semantic zoom from 12-year to daily in one gesture |
    18тЖТ| **Solve Excel pain** | Visualize entire fleet timeline (impossible in spreadsheets) |
    19тЖТ| **Differentiate** | Competitors show paginated tables; we show infinite canvas |
    20тЖТ| **Prove depth** | WebGL rendering at scale signals engineering capability |
    21тЖТ| **Use their data** | Import their actual fleet, show their actual bow-wave |
    22тЖТ
    23тЖТ### 9.1.2 Demo Script (The Pitch)
    24тЖТ
    25тЖТ**The "Financial Impact" Hook Version:**
    26тЖТ
    27тЖТ```
    28тЖТ1. INGEST (30 sec)
    29тЖТ   "I'm dropping in your raw Maximo export."
    30тЖТ   ├втАатАЩ Drag CSV, watch trains appear instantly
    31тЖТ
    32тЖТ2. THE REVEAL - Strategic View (60 sec)
    33тЖТ   "This is the 10-year view."
    34тЖТ   ├втАатАЩ Zoom out to heatmap
    35тЖТ   "See this red cluster in Q2 2027? That's a 'Bow Wave'."
    36тЖТ   "You have 40% of your fleet due for C4 overhauls simultaneously."
    37тЖТ   "That's a $15M capital risk in a single quarter."
    38тЖТ
    39тЖТ3. THE ZOOM - Tactical View (45 sec)
    40тЖТ   "Let's zoom in."
    41тЖТ   ├втАатАЩ Smooth zoom to Gantt
    42тЖТ   "Here are the specific trains causing the jam."
    43тЖТ   ├втАатАЩ Point at 3-4 overlapping C4 blocks
    44тЖТ
    45тЖТ4. THE SOLVE - Operational View (60 sec)
    46тЖТ   "Watch this."
    47тЖТ   ├втАатАЩ Drag a C4 block left
    48тЖТ   "I move this C4 three months earlier."
    49тЖТ   ├втАатАЩ Green snap, constraint walls flash
    50тЖТ   "The system instantly checks parts, labor, and track availability."
    51тЖТ   ├втАатАЩ Toggle man-hour overlay
    52тЖТ   "This week was 120% capacity. Now it's 85%."
    53тЖТ
    54тЖТ5. THE CLOSE (30 sec)
    55тЖТ   ├втАатАЩ Zoom back out
    56тЖТ   "We just smoothed a $15M peak in 3 seconds."
    57тЖТ   "One interface. One truth. 12 years."
    58тЖТ   "Maximo can't do that. Excel can't do that."
    59тЖТ```
    60тЖТ
    61тЖТ**If Client Data Shows No Bow-Wave:**
    62тЖТ
    63тЖТUse the Chaos Monkey feature (Section 9.3.3):
    64тЖТ```
    65тЖТ"Your data actually looks healthy - that's good news."
    66тЖТ"But let me show you what happens with a 3-month supply chain disruption..."
    67тЖТ├втАатАЩ Toggle Chaos Monkey
    68тЖТ"See how that wave forms in 2027? This is why you need visibility."
    69тЖТ```
    70тЖТ
    71тЖТ### 9.1.3 Scope Boundaries
    72тЖТ
    73тЖТ**IN SCOPE:**
    74тЖТ- CSV import (fleet roster, PM history)
    75тЖТ- PM projection engine (10-year horizon)
    76тЖТ- Infinite canvas with semantic zoom (3 levels minimum)
    77тЖТ- Drag-and-drop with constraint validation
    78тЖТ- Mileage balance visualization
    79тЖТ- Man-hour overlay (simulated capacity)
    80тЖТ- Bow-wave indicator
    81тЖТ- Chaos Monkey toggle (hidden, for demo resilience)
    82тЖТ
    83тЖТ**OUT OF SCOPE:**
    84тЖТ- Backend/database (use in-memory)
    85тЖТ- Authentication
    86тЖТ- Real optimizer (use projection heuristics)
    87тЖТ- Maximo integration
    88тЖТ- Multi-user collaboration
    89тЖТ- Report generation
    90тЖТ- Component-level tracking
    91тЖТ
    92тЖТ---
    93тЖТ
    94тЖТ## 9.2 Data Model
    95тЖТ
    96тЖТ### 9.2.1 CSV Input Schemas
    97тЖТ
    98тЖТ#### CSV 1: Fleet Roster (REQUIRED)
    99тЖТ
   100тЖТ```csv
   101тЖТtrain_number,fleet_code,current_mileage_km,commissioning_date
   102тЖТ1001,KS,245000,2018-03-15
   103тЖТ1002,KS,248500,2018-03-20
   104тЖТ1003,KS,242000,2018-04-01
   105тЖТ2001,ALSTOM,312000,2015-06-10
   106тЖТ```
   107тЖТ
   108тЖТ| Column | Type | Required | Description |
   109тЖТ|--------|------|----------|-------------|
   110тЖТ| `train_number` | string | Yes | Unique identifier (e.g., "1001") |
   111тЖТ| `fleet_code` | string | Yes | Fleet type (e.g., "KS", "ALSTOM") |
   112тЖТ| `current_mileage_km` | integer | Yes | Current odometer reading |
   113тЖТ| `commissioning_date` | date | Yes | Format: YYYY-MM-DD |
   114тЖТ
   115тЖТ**Validation Rules:**
   116тЖТ- `train_number` must be unique
   117тЖТ- `current_mileage_km` must be > 0
   118тЖТ- `commissioning_date` must be in the past
   119тЖТ
   120тЖТ---
   121тЖТ
   122тЖТ#### CSV 2: PM History (REQUIRED)
   123тЖТ
   124тЖТ```csv
   125тЖТtrain_number,pm_code,completion_date,mileage_at_completion
   126тЖТ1001,C2,2025-08-15,225000
   127тЖТ1001,C1,2025-11-20,238000
   128тЖТ1002,C3,2024-12-01,180000
   129тЖТ1001,C4,2024-01-10,150000
   130тЖТ```
   131тЖТ
   132тЖТ| Column | Type | Required | Description |
   133тЖТ|--------|------|----------|-------------|
   134тЖТ| `train_number` | string | Yes | References fleet roster |
   135тЖТ| `pm_code` | string | Yes | PM type (C1, C2, C3, C4, C5, OH) |
   136тЖТ| `completion_date` | date | Yes | When PM was completed |
   137тЖТ| `mileage_at_completion` | integer | Yes | Odometer at completion |
   138тЖТ
   139тЖТ**Validation Rules:**
   140тЖТ- `train_number` must exist in fleet roster
   141тЖТ- `pm_code` must match PM rules for train's fleet
   142тЖТ- `mileage_at_completion` must be > 0 (discard zeros)
   143тЖТ- Deduplicate by `(train_number, pm_code, completion_date)`
   144тЖТ
   145тЖТ---
   146тЖТ
   147тЖТ#### CSV 3: PM Rules (PRE-POPULATED, Editable)
   148тЖТ
   149тЖТ```csv
   150тЖТfleet_code,pm_code,interval_km,interval_months,duration_days,estimated_hours,satisfies_codes
   151тЖТKS,C1,12500,6,1,8,
   152тЖТKS,C2,50000,24,3,24,C1
   153тЖТKS,C3,100000,48,7,72,"C1,C2"
   154тЖТKS,C4,200000,96,14,160,"C1,C2,C3"
   155тЖТKS,C5,400000,,21,240,"C1,C2,C3,C4"
   156тЖТKS,OH,800000,,45,500,"C1,C2,C3,C4,C5"
   157тЖТALSTOM,C1,15000,6,1,8,
   158тЖТALSTOM,C2,60000,24,3,28,C1
   159тЖТALSTOM,C3,120000,48,7,80,"C1,C2"
   160тЖТALSTOM,C4,240000,96,14,180,"C1,C2,C3"
   161тЖТALSTOM,OH,960000,,50,600,"C1,C2,C3,C4"
   162тЖТ```
   163тЖТ
   164тЖТ| Column | Type | Required | Description |
   165тЖТ|--------|------|----------|-------------|
   166тЖТ| `fleet_code` | string | Yes | Fleet type |
   167тЖТ| `pm_code` | string | Yes | PM type identifier |
   168тЖТ| `interval_km` | integer | Yes | Mileage trigger threshold |
   169тЖТ| `interval_months` | integer | No | Calendar trigger (NULL = mileage only) |
   170тЖТ| `duration_days` | integer | Yes | Days train is out of service |
   171тЖТ| `estimated_hours` | integer | Yes | Labor hours required |
   172тЖТ| `satisfies_codes` | string | No | Comma-separated lower PMs this satisfies |
   173тЖТ
   174тЖТ**Key Concept: `satisfies_codes`**
   175тЖТ
   176тЖТWhen a C4 is completed, it **satisfies** the requirements for C1, C2, and C3. This means:
   177тЖТ- The mileage counter for C1/C2/C3 resets from the C4 completion point
   178тЖТ- The next C1 is due 12,500km after the C4, not after the last C1
   179тЖТ
   180тЖТ---
   181тЖТ
   182тЖТ### 9.2.2 In-Memory Data Structures
   183тЖТ
   184тЖТ```typescript
   185тЖТ// Imported data
   186тЖТinterface FleetState {
   187тЖТ  trains: Train[];
   188тЖТ  pmHistory: PMHistory[];
   189тЖТ  pmRules: PMRule[];
   190тЖТ}
   191тЖТ
   192тЖТinterface Train {
   193тЖТ  trainNumber: string;
   194тЖТ  fleetCode: string;
   195тЖТ  currentMileageKm: number;
   196тЖТ  commissioningDate: Date;
   197тЖТ  // Calculated
   198тЖТ  estimatedDailyKm: number;
   199тЖТ  confidence: 'HISTORICAL' | 'ESTIMATED';
   200тЖТ}
   201тЖТ
   202тЖТinterface PMHistory {
   203тЖТ  trainNumber: string;
   204тЖТ  pmCode: string;
   205тЖТ  completionDate: Date;
   206тЖТ  mileageAtCompletion: number;
   207тЖТ}
   208тЖТ
   209тЖТinterface PMRule {
   210тЖТ  fleetCode: string;
   211тЖТ  pmCode: string;
   212тЖТ  intervalKm: number;
   213тЖТ  intervalMonths: number | null;
   214тЖТ  durationDays: number;
   215тЖТ  estimatedHours: number;
   216тЖТ  satisfiesCodes: string[];
   217тЖТ}
   218тЖТ
   219тЖТ// Projected data
   220тЖТinterface ProjectedPM {
   221тЖТ  id: string;  // Generated UUID
   222тЖТ  trainNumber: string;
   223тЖТ  pmCode: string;
   224тЖТ  projectedDate: Date;
   225тЖТ  projectedMileageKm: number;
   226тЖТ  triggerType: 'MILEAGE' | 'TIME';
   227тЖТ  confidence: 'HISTORICAL' | 'ESTIMATED';
   228тЖТ  durationDays: number;
   229тЖТ  estimatedHours: number;
   230тЖТ  // For visualization
   231тЖТ  constraintStart: Date;
   232тЖТ  constraintEnd: Date;
   233тЖТ}
   234тЖТ```
   235тЖТ
   236тЖТ---
   237тЖТ
   238тЖТ## 9.3 Projection Engine
   239тЖТ
   240тЖТ### 9.3.1 Core Algorithm
   241тЖТ
   242тЖТ```typescript
   243тЖТ/**
   244тЖТ * Project all PM events for a train over the specified horizon.
   245тЖТ * 
   246тЖТ * CRITICAL: This algorithm correctly handles:
   247тЖТ * 1. PM hierarchy (C4 satisfies C1/C2/C3)
   248тЖТ * 2. Dual triggers (mileage OR time, whichever first)
   249тЖТ * 3. Cascading projections (each PM feeds into next)
   250тЖТ */
   251тЖТfunction projectTrainPMs(
   252тЖТ  train: Train,
   253тЖТ  pmRules: PMRule[],
   254тЖТ  pmHistory: PMHistory[],
   255тЖТ  horizonYears: number = 10
   256тЖТ): ProjectedPM[] {
   257тЖТ  const projections: ProjectedPM[] = [];
   258тЖТ  const horizonEnd = addYears(new Date(), horizonYears);
   259тЖТ  const trainRules = pmRules.filter(r => r.fleetCode === train.fleetCode);
   260тЖТ  const trainHistory = pmHistory.filter(h => h.trainNumber === train.trainNumber);
   261тЖТ  
   262тЖТ  // Calculate daily utilization for this train
   263тЖТ  const dailyKm = calculateDailyUtilization(train, trainHistory);
   264тЖТ  
   265тЖТ  // Create working state (mutable copy of history + projections)
   266тЖТ  let workingHistory = [...trainHistory];
   267тЖТ  let currentMileage = train.currentMileageKm;
   268тЖТ  let currentDate = new Date();
   269тЖТ  
   270тЖТ  // Project until we exceed horizon
   271тЖТ  while (currentDate < horizonEnd) {
   272тЖТ    // Find next PM due across all PM types
   273тЖТ    let nextPM: { rule: PMRule; date: Date; mileage: number; trigger: 'MILEAGE' | 'TIME' } | null = null;
   274тЖТ    
   275тЖТ    for (const rule of trainRules) {
   276тЖТ      const projection = calculateNextDue(
   277тЖТ        train,
   278тЖТ        rule,
   279тЖТ        trainRules,
   280тЖТ        workingHistory,
   281тЖТ        currentMileage,
   282тЖТ        currentDate,
   283тЖТ        dailyKm
   284тЖТ      );
   285тЖТ      
   286тЖТ      if (!nextPM || projection.date < nextPM.date) {
   287тЖТ        nextPM = {
   288тЖТ          rule,
   289тЖТ          date: projection.date,
   290тЖТ          mileage: projection.mileage,
   291тЖТ          trigger: projection.trigger
   292тЖТ        };
   293тЖТ      }
   294тЖТ    }
   295тЖТ    
   296тЖТ    if (!nextPM || nextPM.date > horizonEnd) break;
   297тЖТ    
   298тЖТ    // Create projection
   299тЖТ    const projection: ProjectedPM = {
   300тЖТ      id: generateUUID(),
   301тЖТ      trainNumber: train.trainNumber,
   302тЖТ      pmCode: nextPM.rule.pmCode,
   303тЖТ      projectedDate: nextPM.date,
   304тЖТ      projectedMileageKm: nextPM.mileage,
   305тЖТ      triggerType: nextPM.trigger,
   306тЖТ      confidence: workingHistory.length > 0 ? 'HISTORICAL' : 'ESTIMATED',
   307тЖТ      durationDays: nextPM.rule.durationDays,
   308тЖТ      estimatedHours: nextPM.rule.estimatedHours,
   309тЖТ      constraintStart: addDays(nextPM.date, -Math.round(nextPM.rule.intervalKm * 0.1 / dailyKm)),
   310тЖТ      constraintEnd: addDays(nextPM.date, Math.round(nextPM.rule.intervalKm * 0.1 / dailyKm))
   311тЖТ    };
   312тЖТ    
   313тЖТ    projections.push(projection);
   314тЖТ    
   315тЖТ    // Add to working history (for next iteration)
   316тЖТ    workingHistory.push({
   317тЖТ      trainNumber: train.trainNumber,
   318тЖТ      pmCode: nextPM.rule.pmCode,
   319тЖТ      completionDate: nextPM.date,
   320тЖТ      mileageAtCompletion: nextPM.mileage
   321тЖТ    });
   322тЖТ    
   323тЖТ    // Advance state
   324тЖТ    currentDate = addDays(nextPM.date, nextPM.rule.durationDays);
   325тЖТ    currentMileage = nextPM.mileage + (nextPM.rule.durationDays * dailyKm * 0.1); // Minimal mileage during PM
   326тЖТ  }
   327тЖТ  
   328тЖТ  return projections;
   329тЖТ}
   330тЖТ
   331тЖТ/**
   332тЖТ * Calculate when the next instance of a specific PM type is due.
   333тЖТ * Accounts for PM hierarchy (C4 satisfies C1/C2/C3).
   334тЖТ * 
   335тЖТ * CRITICAL: Handles "Cold Start" case where train has no PM history.
   336тЖТ * Without this fix, trains with 245k km and no history would show
   337тЖТ * ALL PMs as overdue TODAY (demo disaster).
   338тЖТ */
   339тЖТfunction calculateNextDue(
   340тЖТ  train: Train,
   341тЖТ  targetRule: PMRule,
   342тЖТ  allRules: PMRule[],
   343тЖТ  history: PMHistory[],
   344тЖТ  currentMileage: number,
   345тЖТ  currentDate: Date,
   346тЖТ  dailyKm: number
   347тЖТ): { date: Date; mileage: number; trigger: 'MILEAGE' | 'TIME' } {
   348тЖТ  
   349тЖТ  // 1. Find all PM types that SATISFY the target PM
   350тЖТ  const satisfyingCodes = getSatisfyingCodes(targetRule.pmCode, allRules);
   351тЖТ  
   352тЖТ  // 2. Find the most recent PM that satisfies this requirement
   353тЖТ  const lastSatisfying = history
   354тЖТ    .filter(h => satisfyingCodes.includes(h.pmCode))
   355тЖТ    .sort((a, b) => b.mileageAtCompletion - a.mileageAtCompletion)[0];
   356тЖТ  
   357тЖТ  // 3. Handle "Cold Start" - no PM history exists
   358тЖТ  //    Assume train has been maintained on schedule since commissioning.
   359тЖТ  //    Calculate which cycle we're currently in and when it started.
   360тЖТ  let lastMileage: number;
   361тЖТ  let lastDate: Date;
   362тЖТ  
   363тЖТ  if (lastSatisfying) {
   364тЖТ    // Normal case: use actual history
   365тЖТ    lastMileage = lastSatisfying.mileageAtCompletion;
   366тЖТ    lastDate = new Date(lastSatisfying.completionDate);
   367тЖТ  } else {
   368тЖТ    // COLD START FIX: Create "virtual" last PM
   369тЖТ    // Calculate how many complete cycles since commissioning
   370тЖТ    const cyclesCompleted = Math.floor(currentMileage / targetRule.intervalKm);
   371тЖТ    
   372тЖТ    if (cyclesCompleted > 0) {
   373тЖТ      // Assume last PM occurred at start of current cycle
   374тЖТ      lastMileage = cyclesCompleted * targetRule.intervalKm;
   375тЖТ      // Estimate when that mileage was reached
   376тЖТ      const daysSinceCommission = differenceInDays(currentDate, train.commissioningDate);
   377тЖТ      const daysPerCycle = (targetRule.intervalKm / dailyKm);
   378тЖТ      const daysAgo = (currentMileage - lastMileage) / dailyKm;
   379тЖТ      lastDate = addDays(currentDate, -daysAgo);
   380тЖТ    } else {
   381тЖТ      // Train hasn't completed first cycle yet - use commissioning as baseline
   382тЖТ      lastMileage = 0;
   383тЖТ      lastDate = train.commissioningDate;
   384тЖТ    }
   385тЖТ  }
   386тЖТ  
   387тЖТ  // 4. Calculate mileage-based due date
   388тЖТ  const kmSinceLast = currentMileage - lastMileage;
   389тЖТ  const kmRemaining = Math.max(0, targetRule.intervalKm - kmSinceLast);
   390тЖТ  const daysUntilMileageDue = kmRemaining / dailyKm;
   391тЖТ  const dateByMileage = addDays(currentDate, daysUntilMileageDue);
   392тЖТ  const mileageAtDue = currentMileage + kmRemaining;
   393тЖТ  
   394тЖТ  // 5. Calculate time-based due date (if interval defined)
   395тЖТ  let dateByTime: Date | null = null;
   396тЖТ  if (targetRule.intervalMonths) {
   397тЖТ    dateByTime = addMonths(lastDate, targetRule.intervalMonths);
   398тЖТ  }
   399тЖТ  
   400тЖТ  // 6. Return whichever comes first (dual trigger)
   401тЖТ  if (dateByTime && dateByTime < dateByMileage) {
   402тЖТ    // Time trigger fires first
   403тЖТ    const daysUntilTime = differenceInDays(dateByTime, currentDate);
   404тЖТ    const mileageAtTime = currentMileage + (Math.max(0, daysUntilTime) * dailyKm);
   405тЖТ    return { date: dateByTime, mileage: mileageAtTime, trigger: 'TIME' };
   406тЖТ  } else {
   407тЖТ    return { date: dateByMileage, mileage: mileageAtDue, trigger: 'MILEAGE' };
   408тЖТ  }
   409тЖТ}
   410тЖТ
   411тЖТ/**
   412тЖТ * Find all PM codes that satisfy a target PM code.
   413тЖТ * Returns the target itself plus any higher-level PMs that include it.
   414тЖТ */
   415тЖТfunction getSatisfyingCodes(targetCode: string, allRules: PMRule[]): string[] {
   416тЖТ  const result = [targetCode];
   417тЖТ  
   418тЖТ  for (const rule of allRules) {
   419тЖТ    if (rule.satisfiesCodes.includes(targetCode)) {
   420тЖТ      result.push(rule.pmCode);
   421тЖТ    }
   422тЖТ  }
   423тЖТ  
   424тЖТ  return result;
   425тЖТ}
   426тЖТ
   427тЖТ/**
   428тЖТ * Calculate daily mileage rate for a train.
   429тЖТ * Uses recent velocity (between last 2 PMs) if available, falls back to lifetime average.
   430тЖТ */
   431тЖТfunction calculateDailyUtilization(train: Train, history: PMHistory[]): number {
   432тЖТ  // Filter valid entries
   433тЖТ  const validHistory = history
   434тЖТ    .filter(h => h.mileageAtCompletion > 0)
   435тЖТ    .sort((a, b) => new Date(b.completionDate).getTime() - new Date(a.completionDate).getTime());
   436тЖТ  
   437тЖТ  // Try: Recent velocity between last 2 PMs
   438тЖТ  if (validHistory.length >= 2) {
   439тЖТ    const recent = validHistory[0];
   440тЖТ    const previous = validHistory[1];
   441тЖТ    const daysBetween = differenceInDays(
   442тЖТ      new Date(recent.completionDate),
   443тЖТ      new Date(previous.completionDate)
   444тЖТ    );
   445тЖТ    const kmBetween = recent.mileageAtCompletion - previous.mileageAtCompletion;
   446тЖТ    
   447тЖТ    // Sanity checks
   448тЖТ    if (daysBetween >= 14 && kmBetween > 0) {
   449тЖТ      const rate = kmBetween / daysBetween;
   450тЖТ      // Typical metro range: 50-500 km/day
   451тЖТ      if (rate > 50 && rate < 500) {
   452тЖТ        return rate;
   453тЖТ      }
   454тЖТ    }
   455тЖТ  }
   456тЖТ  
   457тЖТ  // Fallback: Lifetime average from commissioning
   458тЖТ  const daysSinceCommission = differenceInDays(new Date(), train.commissioningDate);
   459тЖТ  if (daysSinceCommission > 0 && train.currentMileageKm > 0) {
   460тЖТ    return train.currentMileageKm / daysSinceCommission;
   461тЖТ  }
   462тЖТ  
   463тЖТ  // Last resort: Fleet typical value
   464тЖТ  return 150;  // Conservative metro average
   465тЖТ}
   466тЖТ```

   479тЖТ### 9.3.3 "Chaos Monkey" Bow-Wave Generator (Demo Only)
   480тЖТ
   481тЖТ**Purpose:** If the client's data is well-maintained (no bow-wave), the demo loses impact. 
   482тЖТThis hidden feature artificially compresses PM schedules to force a visible bow-wave.
   483тЖТ
   484тЖТ```typescript
   485тЖТ/**
   486тЖТ * Simulate a supply chain disruption that delays 20% of fleet maintenance.
   487тЖТ * Creates artificial "bow wave" for demo purposes.
   488тЖТ * 
   489тЖТ * DEMO ONLY - Not for production use.
   490тЖТ * 
   491тЖТ * Pitch: "This is your data as-is. Now, let's simulate a 3-month 
   492тЖТ *        supply chain disruption..." (Toggle) ├втАатАЩ "See that wave forming?"
   493тЖТ */
   494тЖТfunction applyChaosMonkey(
   495тЖТ  projections: ProjectedPM[],
   496тЖТ  config: ChaosConfig
   497тЖТ): ProjectedPM[] {
   498тЖТ  const { 
   499тЖТ    delayMonths = 3,          // How long the "disruption" lasts
   500тЖТ    affectedPercent = 20,     // % of fleet affected
   501тЖТ    targetQuarter = 'Q2-2027' // When the wave should appear
   502тЖТ  } = config;
   503тЖТ  
   504тЖТ  // 1. Select random subset of trains
   505тЖТ  const trainNumbers = [...new Set(projections.map(p => p.trainNumber))];
   506тЖТ  const affectedCount = Math.ceil(trainNumbers.length * (affectedPercent / 100));
   507тЖТ  const affectedTrains = shuffleArray(trainNumbers).slice(0, affectedCount);
   508тЖТ  
   509тЖТ  // 2. Find PMs in the 6 months before target quarter and delay them
   510тЖТ  const targetDate = parseQuarter(targetQuarter);
   511тЖТ  const windowStart = addMonths(targetDate, -6);
   512тЖТ  
   513тЖТ  return projections.map(pm => {
   514тЖТ    if (!affectedTrains.includes(pm.trainNumber)) return pm;
   515тЖТ    
   516тЖТ    const pmDate = new Date(pm.projectedDate);
   517тЖТ    if (pmDate >= windowStart && pmDate < targetDate) {
   518тЖТ      // Compress this PM into the target quarter
   519тЖТ      const daysIntoQuarter = Math.random() * 90; // Spread across 90 days
   520тЖТ      return {
   521тЖТ        ...pm,
   522тЖТ        projectedDate: addDays(targetDate, daysIntoQuarter),
   523тЖТ        isChaosAffected: true  // Flag for visual indicator
   524тЖТ      };
   525тЖТ    }
   526тЖТ    
   527тЖТ    return pm;
   528тЖТ  });
   529тЖТ}
   530тЖТ
   531тЖТinterface ChaosConfig {
   532тЖТ  delayMonths?: number;
   533тЖТ  affectedPercent?: number;
   534тЖТ  targetQuarter?: string;
   535тЖТ}
   536тЖТ
   537тЖТ// UI: Hidden toggle in toolbar (Shift+Click on logo, or URL param ?chaos=1)
   538тЖТ```
   539тЖТ

   541тЖТ
   542тЖТ1. Import client's data ├втАатАЩ Show current state (may be healthy)
   543тЖТ2. "Let me show you what happens if there's a disruption..."
   544тЖТ3. Activate Chaos Monkey ├втАатАЩ Bow-wave appears in strategic view
   545тЖТ4. "See that $15M cluster? That's 40% of your C4s hitting simultaneously."
   546тЖТ5. Zoom in ├втАатАЩ Show the jammed schedule
   547тЖТ6. Drag to resolve ├втАатАЩ "We just smoothed that peak in 3 seconds."
